MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Off Calendar Sep-29-2022 Set For Trial On Dec-18-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS BAY AREA MASTER TENANT, LLC and GOLDEN GATEIDENCE OPCO, LLC DBA VICTORIAN, PROVIDENCE GROUP, INC.'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT:

Defendants Bay Area Master Tenant, LLC, Golden Gateidence Opco, LLC DBA Victorian Healthcare Center, and Providence Group, Inc.'s demurrers to plaintiffs Michelle Benoit and Diana Johnson's amended complaint are overruled.

[see word minutes for details.]

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS BAY AREA MASTER TENANT, LLC, GOLDEN GATEIDENCE OPCO, LLC DBA VICTORIAN and PROVIDENCE GROUP, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendants' unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend.
